entries.label: channel-claude-agent-panel-dark
entries.source: owner CleanShot drop 2026-07-20 (raw original kept in inbox/, pixels local-only)
entries.note: Slack desktop (dark/purple), workspace open to a channel with a Claude agent DM/thread panel open on the right. Theme: dark, framing: app-window. Contains personal content; see inbox/triage-2026-07-20.json for redaction worklist.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.
